description: Style NoteThis Summer lino perros presents a range of wallets that catch you by surprise with their pop colours. Pair it with Western or ethnic outfits  to add a dash of colour to your ensemble. Its multiple pockets and slots help you keep your monetary essentials organised- in style. Product DetailsTwo fold textured white wallet with press down claspSix credit card slots with one slip pocket on one side and two compartments (one with a zippered separator) with a slip pocket on the other sideEmbossed branding on frontMaterials and CareSyntheticWipe with damp cloth to remove dirtSizeHeight: 8.5 cmWidth: 18 cm
